mission: Vugandakumva Initiative was founded to break the silence on Gender-Based Violence (GBV) in Rwanda, providing a safe platform for survivors to speak out, seek help, and heal.

isange_one_stop_centers.name: Isange One Stop Center (Kigali/Kacyiru)
isange_one_stop_centers.description: Headquarters. Offers 24/7 free comprehensive services including medical care, psycho-social support, safe rooms, and legal/police assistance. Located at Kacyiru Hospital.

isange_one_stop_centers.name: Isange One Stop Centers (Nationwide)
isange_one_stop_centers.description: Available in all District Hospitals across Rwanda. They provide holistic and free care for survivors of GBV and child abuse.

rwanda_gbv_laws_and_rights.law_n_59_2008: The Law on Prevention and Punishment of GBV strictly criminalizes physical, sexual, psychological, and economic violence.
rwanda_gbv_laws_and_rights.marital_rape: Marital rape is explicitly recognized and criminalized under Rwandan law.
rwanda_gbv_laws_and_rights.survivor_rights: Survivors have the right to free medical, legal, and psychological assistance, as well as protection from their abusers (via protection orders from courts).

reporting_process_to_rib: Step 1: Focus on immediate physical safety and seek urgent medical attention if injured.
Step 2: Go to the nearest Isange One Stop Center (or District Hospital) for free evidence collection and medical care BEFORE washing, changing clothes, or destroying evidence.
Step 3: At the center, a Rwanda Investigation Bureau (RIB) officer will take your statement confidentially.
Step 4: You will receive psychosocial counseling and legal guidance from trained professionals.
gbv_forms_and_definitions: Physical Violence: Any act causing physical harm (hitting, pushing, burning).
Sexual Violence: Any non-consensual sexual act, attempted sexual act, or unwanted sexual comments.
Psychological/Emotional Violence: Controlling behavior, isolation, intimidation, verbal abuse, and threats.
Economic Violence: Denying access to funds, forbidding employment, or controlling financial resources.
